AuctraDocs
API reference Changelog GitHub Get an API key

Get started

IntroductionQuickstartAuthenticationEnvironments

Build

The signing modelAuction lifecycleIdempotencyPaginationRate limitsWebhooksGuide: list an itemGuide: place a bidGuide: settle and pay out

Reference

ErrorsAPI referenceChangelog

Reference

API reference

Base URL https://auctra-api-production.up.railway.app. Every request needs Authorization: Bearer sk_test_…. Amounts are decimal strings of wei.

Auctions GET List auctions POST Create an auction GET Retrieve an auction POST Settle an ended auction POST Cancel an auction POST Claim a won item
Bids GET List bids on an auction POST Place a bid
Refunds GET List refund credits GET Read a withdrawable balance POST Withdraw a refund balance
Transactions POST Broadcast a signed transaction GET Retrieve a transaction
Webhooks GET List webhook endpoints POST Create a webhook endpoint DELETE Delete a webhook endpoint GET List events GET Retrieve an event
Health GET Check API health

#Auctions

Create, browse, settle and cancel auctions.

#List auctions

GET/v1/auctions
Requires scope auctions:read

Parameters

limit integer query default 25

Page size, 1–100.

starting_after string query

An object id to page after. Cursor, not offset: auctions are inserted constantly, and ?page=2 would skip or duplicate rows whenever a new one lands between requests.

status "pending" | "live" | "ending" | "ended" | "settled" | "cancelled" query

Filter by lifecycle status. Note this is derived from the chain clock at read time, so an auction whose end_time just passed is reported ended even if the settlement transaction hasn't been sent yet.

seller string query
token_contract string query

Responses

200A paginated list of auctions.
401
429
curl -X GET "$AUCTRA_URL/v1/auctions" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUCTRA_KEY"
const res = await fetch(`${AUCTRA_URL}/v1/auctions`, {
  method: "GET",
  headers: {
    "Authorization": `Bearer ${AUCTRA_KEY}`,
  },
});
const data = await res.json();
import requests
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {AUCTRA_KEY}"}
res = requests.get(f"{AUCTRA_URL}/v1/auctions", headers=headers)
data = res.json()
json
{
  "object": "list",
  "data": [
    {
      "object": "auction",
      "id": "auc_3f9a2c7b1d4e",
      "status": "live",
      "chain_id": 11155111,
      "contract": "0x5c9d3f1a7b2e4c6d8f0a2b4c6d8e0f2a4b6c8d0e",
      "onchain_id": 117,
      "seller": "0x7a3f1c8b9d2e4f6a0b1c2d3e4f5a6b7c8d9e0f1a",
      "item": {
        "token_contract": "0x2b1d4e6f8a0c2e4f6a8b0d2f4a6c8e0b2d4f6a8c",
        "token_id": "42"
      },
      "reserve_price_wei": "1000000000000000000",
      "reserve_price_display": "1",
      "min_increment_bps": 500,
      "minimum_bid_wei": "1102500000000000000",
      "highest_bid_wei": "1050000000000000000",
      "highest_bidder": "0x9c8b7a6f5e4d3c2b1a0f9e8d7c6b5a4f3e2d1c0b",
      "start_time": "2026-07-08T10:00:00.000Z",
      "end_time": "2026-07-09T10:00:00.000Z",
      "anti_snipe": {
        "extension_window_seconds": 300,
        "extensions_used": 0,
        "max_extensions": 10
      },
      "transactions": {
        "created": "0x4c1d7a90f3b2e5c8a1d4f7b0e3c6a9d2f5b8e1c4a7d0f3b6e9c2a5d8f1b4e7c0",
        "settled": null
      },
      "metadata": {
        "lot_number": "L-0117"
      },
      "created_at": "2026-07-08T09:59:41.204Z",
      "updated_at": "2026-07-08T14:22:07.881Z"
    }
  ],
  "has_more": false,
  "next_cursor": null
}

#Create an auction

POST/v1/auctions
Requires scope auctions:write

Escrows the item and opens the clock. Returns 201 with a transaction_request you must sign as the seller.

The auction is pending until the AuctionCreated log confirms — a broadcast is not a confirmation. Wait for the auction.created webhook before showing it to bidders.

Creating an auction requires the AuctionHouse contract to already be approved to transfer the token. Call approve() or setApprovalForAll() on the token contract first, or the transaction will revert with NotApprovedForTransfer.

Parameters

Idempotency-Key string header

A unique string, e.g. a UUID. Replaying the same key with the same body returns the original response verbatim; with a different body it returns 409 idempotency_key_reused. Keys expire after 24 hours.

Responses

201Auction created, awaiting signature and confirmation.
400
401
409
422
curl -X POST "$AUCTRA_URL/v1/auctions" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUCTRA_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Idempotency-Key: $(uuidgen)" \
  -d '{
    "mode": "prepared",
    "seller": "0x7a3f1c8b9d2e4f6a0b1c2d3e4f5a6b7c8d9e0f1a",
    "token_contract": "0x2b1d4e6f8a0c2e4f6a8b0d2f4a6c8e0b2d4f6a8c",
    "token_id": "42",
    "reserve_price_wei": "1000000000000000000",
    "duration_seconds": 86400,
    "min_increment_bps": 500,
    "metadata": {
      "lot_number": "L-0117",
      "catalogue": "spring-2026"
    }
  }'
const res = await fetch(`${AUCTRA_URL}/v1/auctions`, {
  method: "POST",
  headers: {
    "Authorization": `Bearer ${AUCTRA_KEY}`,
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Idempotency-Key": crypto.randomUUID(),
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
    "mode": "prepared",
    "seller": "0x7a3f1c8b9d2e4f6a0b1c2d3e4f5a6b7c8d9e0f1a",
    "token_contract": "0x2b1d4e6f8a0c2e4f6a8b0d2f4a6c8e0b2d4f6a8c",
    "token_id": "42",
    "reserve_price_wei": "1000000000000000000",
    "duration_seconds": 86400,
    "min_increment_bps": 500,
    "metadata": {
      "lot_number": "L-0117",
      "catalogue": "spring-2026"
    }
  }),
});
const data = await res.json();
import requests
import uuid
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {AUCTRA_KEY}"}
headers["Idempotency-Key"] = str(uuid.uuid4())
res = requests.post(f"{AUCTRA_URL}/v1/auctions", headers=headers, json={
    "mode": "prepared",
    "seller": "0x7a3f1c8b9d2e4f6a0b1c2d3e4f5a6b7c8d9e0f1a",
    "token_contract": "0x2b1d4e6f8a0c2e4f6a8b0d2f4a6c8e0b2d4f6a8c",
    "token_id": "42",
    "reserve_price_wei": "1000000000000000000",
    "duration_seconds": 86400,
    "min_increment_bps": 500,
    "metadata": {
        "lot_number": "L-0117",
        "catalogue": "spring-2026",
    },
})
data = res.json()
json
{
  "object": "auction",
  "id": "auc_3f9a2c7b1d4e",
  "status": "live",
  "chain_id": 11155111,
  "contract": "0x5c9d3f1a7b2e4c6d8f0a2b4c6d8e0f2a4b6c8d0e",
  "onchain_id": 117,
  "seller": "0x7a3f1c8b9d2e4f6a0b1c2d3e4f5a6b7c8d9e0f1a",
  "item": {
    "token_contract": "0x2b1d4e6f8a0c2e4f6a8b0d2f4a6c8e0b2d4f6a8c",
    "token_id": "42"
  },
  "reserve_price_wei": "1000000000000000000",
  "reserve_price_display": "1",
  "min_increment_bps": 500,
  "minimum_bid_wei": "1102500000000000000",
  "highest_bid_wei": "1050000000000000000",
  "highest_bidder": "0x9c8b7a6f5e4d3c2b1a0f9e8d7c6b5a4f3e2d1c0b",
  "start_time": "2026-07-08T10:00:00.000Z",
  "end_time": "2026-07-09T10:00:00.000Z",
  "anti_snipe": {
    "extension_window_seconds": 300,
    "extensions_used": 0,
    "max_extensions": 10
  },
  "transactions": {
    "created": "0x4c1d7a90f3b2e5c8a1d4f7b0e3c6a9d2f5b8e1c4a7d0f3b6e9c2a5d8f1b4e7c0",
    "settled": null
  },
  "metadata": {
    "lot_number": "L-0117"
  },
  "created_at": "2026-07-08T09:59:41.204Z",
  "updated_at": "2026-07-08T14:22:07.881Z"
}

#Retrieve an auction

GET/v1/auctions/{id}
Requires scope auctions:read

Parameters

id string path Required

An auction id, e.g. auc_3f9a2c7b1d4e.

Responses

200The auction.
404
curl -X GET "$AUCTRA_URL/v1/auctions/{id}" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUCTRA_KEY"
const res = await fetch(`${AUCTRA_URL}/v1/auctions/${id}`, {
  method: "GET",
  headers: {
    "Authorization": `Bearer ${AUCTRA_KEY}`,
  },
});
const data = await res.json();
import requests
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {AUCTRA_KEY}"}
res = requests.get(f"{AUCTRA_URL}/v1/auctions/{id}", headers=headers)
data = res.json()
json
{
  "object": "auction",
  "id": "auc_3f9a2c7b1d4e",
  "status": "live",
  "chain_id": 11155111,
  "contract": "0x5c9d3f1a7b2e4c6d8f0a2b4c6d8e0f2a4b6c8d0e",
  "onchain_id": 117,
  "seller": "0x7a3f1c8b9d2e4f6a0b1c2d3e4f5a6b7c8d9e0f1a",
  "item": {
    "token_contract": "0x2b1d4e6f8a0c2e4f6a8b0d2f4a6c8e0b2d4f6a8c",
    "token_id": "42"
  },
  "reserve_price_wei": "1000000000000000000",
  "reserve_price_display": "1",
  "min_increment_bps": 500,
  "minimum_bid_wei": "1102500000000000000",
  "highest_bid_wei": "1050000000000000000",
  "highest_bidder": "0x9c8b7a6f5e4d3c2b1a0f9e8d7c6b5a4f3e2d1c0b",
  "start_time": "2026-07-08T10:00:00.000Z",
  "end_time": "2026-07-09T10:00:00.000Z",
  "anti_snipe": {
    "extension_window_seconds": 300,
    "extensions_used": 0,
    "max_extensions": 10
  },
  "transactions": {
    "created": "0x4c1d7a90f3b2e5c8a1d4f7b0e3c6a9d2f5b8e1c4a7d0f3b6e9c2a5d8f1b4e7c0",
    "settled": null
  },
  "metadata": {
    "lot_number": "L-0117"
  },
  "created_at": "2026-07-08T09:59:41.204Z",
  "updated_at": "2026-07-08T14:22:07.881Z"
}

#Settle an ended auction

POST/v1/auctions/{id}/settle
Requires scope auctions:write

Transfers the item to the winner and credits the proceeds to the seller. Callable by anyone once end_time has passed — settlement is a public good, not a privilege. Set mode: "managed" to have Auctra broadcast it from your configured signer.

Parameters

id string path Required

An auction id, e.g. auc_3f9a2c7b1d4e.

Idempotency-Key string header

A unique string, e.g. a UUID. Replaying the same key with the same body returns the original response verbatim; with a different body it returns 409 idempotency_key_reused. Keys expire after 24 hours.

Body

mode "prepared" | "managed"

Responses

200Settlement transaction prepared or broadcast.
400The auction has not ended yet (`auction_not_ended`).
curl -X POST "$AUCTRA_URL/v1/auctions/{id}/settle" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUCTRA_KEY"
const res = await fetch(`${AUCTRA_URL}/v1/auctions/${id}/settle`, {
  method: "POST",
  headers: {
    "Authorization": `Bearer ${AUCTRA_KEY}`,
    "Idempotency-Key": crypto.randomUUID(),
  },
});
const data = await res.json();
import requests
import uuid
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {AUCTRA_KEY}"}
headers["Idempotency-Key"] = str(uuid.uuid4())
res = requests.post(f"{AUCTRA_URL}/v1/auctions/{id}/settle", headers=headers)
data = res.json()
json
{
  "object": "auction",
  "id": "auc_3f9a2c7b1d4e",
  "status": "live",
  "chain_id": 11155111,
  "contract": "0x5c9d3f1a7b2e4c6d8f0a2b4c6d8e0f2a4b6c8d0e",
  "onchain_id": 117,
  "seller": "0x7a3f1c8b9d2e4f6a0b1c2d3e4f5a6b7c8d9e0f1a",
  "item": {
    "token_contract": "0x2b1d4e6f8a0c2e4f6a8b0d2f4a6c8e0b2d4f6a8c",
    "token_id": "42"
  },
  "reserve_price_wei": "1000000000000000000",
  "reserve_price_display": "1",
  "min_increment_bps": 500,
  "minimum_bid_wei": "1102500000000000000",
  "highest_bid_wei": "1050000000000000000",
  "highest_bidder": "0x9c8b7a6f5e4d3c2b1a0f9e8d7c6b5a4f3e2d1c0b",
  "start_time": "2026-07-08T10:00:00.000Z",
  "end_time": "2026-07-09T10:00:00.000Z",
  "anti_snipe": {
    "extension_window_seconds": 300,
    "extensions_used": 0,
    "max_extensions": 10
  },
  "transactions": {
    "created": "0x4c1d7a90f3b2e5c8a1d4f7b0e3c6a9d2f5b8e1c4a7d0f3b6e9c2a5d8f1b4e7c0",
    "settled": null
  },
  "metadata": {
    "lot_number": "L-0117"
  },
  "created_at": "2026-07-08T09:59:41.204Z",
  "updated_at": "2026-07-08T14:22:07.881Z"
}

#Cancel an auction

POST/v1/auctions/{id}/cancel
Requires scope auctions:write

Only possible while the auction has zero bids. Once someone has committed ETH, no one — not the seller, not the contract deployer, not Auctra — can pull the lot.

Parameters

id string path Required

An auction id, e.g. auc_3f9a2c7b1d4e.

Idempotency-Key string header

A unique string, e.g. a UUID. Replaying the same key with the same body returns the original response verbatim; with a different body it returns 409 idempotency_key_reused. Keys expire after 24 hours.

Responses

200Cancellation transaction prepared.
400The auction already has bids (`auction_has_bids`).
curl -X POST "$AUCTRA_URL/v1/auctions/{id}/cancel" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUCTRA_KEY"
const res = await fetch(`${AUCTRA_URL}/v1/auctions/${id}/cancel`, {
  method: "POST",
  headers: {
    "Authorization": `Bearer ${AUCTRA_KEY}`,
    "Idempotency-Key": crypto.randomUUID(),
  },
});
const data = await res.json();
import requests
import uuid
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {AUCTRA_KEY}"}
headers["Idempotency-Key"] = str(uuid.uuid4())
res = requests.post(f"{AUCTRA_URL}/v1/auctions/{id}/cancel", headers=headers)
data = res.json()
json
{
  "object": "auction",
  "id": "auc_3f9a2c7b1d4e",
  "status": "live",
  "chain_id": 11155111,
  "contract": "0x5c9d3f1a7b2e4c6d8f0a2b4c6d8e0f2a4b6c8d0e",
  "onchain_id": 117,
  "seller": "0x7a3f1c8b9d2e4f6a0b1c2d3e4f5a6b7c8d9e0f1a",
  "item": {
    "token_contract": "0x2b1d4e6f8a0c2e4f6a8b0d2f4a6c8e0b2d4f6a8c",
    "token_id": "42"
  },
  "reserve_price_wei": "1000000000000000000",
  "reserve_price_display": "1",
  "min_increment_bps": 500,
  "minimum_bid_wei": "1102500000000000000",
  "highest_bid_wei": "1050000000000000000",
  "highest_bidder": "0x9c8b7a6f5e4d3c2b1a0f9e8d7c6b5a4f3e2d1c0b",
  "start_time": "2026-07-08T10:00:00.000Z",
  "end_time": "2026-07-09T10:00:00.000Z",
  "anti_snipe": {
    "extension_window_seconds": 300,
    "extensions_used": 0,
    "max_extensions": 10
  },
  "transactions": {
    "created": "0x4c1d7a90f3b2e5c8a1d4f7b0e3c6a9d2f5b8e1c4a7d0f3b6e9c2a5d8f1b4e7c0",
    "settled": null
  },
  "metadata": {
    "lot_number": "L-0117"
  },
  "created_at": "2026-07-08T09:59:41.204Z",
  "updated_at": "2026-07-08T14:22:07.881Z"
}

#Claim a won item

POST/v1/auctions/{id}/claim
Requires scope auctions:write

Prepares claimItem() for the winning bidder.

Parameters

id string path Required

An auction id, e.g. auc_3f9a2c7b1d4e.

Idempotency-Key string header

A unique string, e.g. a UUID. Replaying the same key with the same body returns the original response verbatim; with a different body it returns 409 idempotency_key_reused. Keys expire after 24 hours.

Responses

200Claim transaction prepared.
curl -X POST "$AUCTRA_URL/v1/auctions/{id}/claim" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUCTRA_KEY"
const res = await fetch(`${AUCTRA_URL}/v1/auctions/${id}/claim`, {
  method: "POST",
  headers: {
    "Authorization": `Bearer ${AUCTRA_KEY}`,
    "Idempotency-Key": crypto.randomUUID(),
  },
});
const data = await res.json();
import requests
import uuid
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {AUCTRA_KEY}"}
headers["Idempotency-Key"] = str(uuid.uuid4())
res = requests.post(f"{AUCTRA_URL}/v1/auctions/{id}/claim", headers=headers)
data = res.json()

#Bids

Place bids and read the bid history of an auction.

#List bids on an auction

GET/v1/auctions/{id}/bids
Requires scope auctions:read

Parameters

id string path Required

An auction id, e.g. auc_3f9a2c7b1d4e.

limit integer query default 25

Page size, 1–100.

starting_after string query

An object id to page after. Cursor, not offset: auctions are inserted constantly, and ?page=2 would skip or duplicate rows whenever a new one lands between requests.

Responses

200Bid history, newest first.
404
curl -X GET "$AUCTRA_URL/v1/auctions/{id}/bids" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUCTRA_KEY"
const res = await fetch(`${AUCTRA_URL}/v1/auctions/${id}/bids`, {
  method: "GET",
  headers: {
    "Authorization": `Bearer ${AUCTRA_KEY}`,
  },
});
const data = await res.json();
import requests
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {AUCTRA_KEY}"}
res = requests.get(f"{AUCTRA_URL}/v1/auctions/{id}/bids", headers=headers)
data = res.json()
json
{
  "object": "list",
  "data": [
    {
      "object": "bid",
      "id": "bid_8d2f4a6c1e3b",
      "auction": "auc_3f9a2c7b1d4e",
      "bidder": "0x9c8b7a6f5e4d3c2b1a0f9e8d7c6b5a4f3e2d1c0b",
      "amount_wei": "1050000000000000000",
      "amount_display": "1.05",
      "status": "winning",
      "transaction_hash": "0x8e1c4a7d0f3b6e9c2a5d8f1b4e7c04c1d7a90f3b2e5c8a1d4f7b0e3c6a9d2f5b",
      "block_number": 6142301,
      "placed_at": "2026-07-08T14:22:07.881Z"
    }
  ],
  "has_more": false,
  "next_cursor": null
}

#Place a bid

POST/v1/auctions/{id}/bids
Requires scope auctions:write

Validates the bid against the live minimum, simulates it against the bidder's address, and returns an unsigned transaction. Nothing is committed until the bidder signs and the transaction confirms.

There is no managed mode here. Bidding spends the bidder's balance; no configuration makes it appropriate for Auctra to do that on their behalf.

A bid landing inside the final extension_window_seconds pushes the end time back, up to max_extensions times. Your countdown must read end_time from the auction.extended webhook, not cache it.

Parameters

id string path Required

An auction id, e.g. auc_3f9a2c7b1d4e.

Idempotency-Key string header

A unique string, e.g. a UUID. Replaying the same key with the same body returns the original response verbatim; with a different body it returns 409 idempotency_key_reused. Keys expire after 24 hours.

Body

bidder string Required

A 20-byte Ethereum address, lowercased in responses.

amount_wei string Required

A decimal string of wei. Always a string: 1 ETH = 10^18 wei, and JSON numbers are doubles, which lose integer precision above 2^53.

Responses

200A bid intent with a transaction to sign.
400The bid was rejected before it cost anyone gas. `bid_below_minimum`
404
curl -X POST "$AUCTRA_URL/v1/auctions/{id}/bids" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUCTRA_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Idempotency-Key: $(uuidgen)" \
  -d '{
    "bidder": "0x9c8b7a6f5e4d3c2b1a0f9e8d7c6b5a4f3e2d1c0b",
    "amount_wei": "1050000000000000000"
  }'
const res = await fetch(`${AUCTRA_URL}/v1/auctions/${id}/bids`, {
  method: "POST",
  headers: {
    "Authorization": `Bearer ${AUCTRA_KEY}`,
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Idempotency-Key": crypto.randomUUID(),
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
    "bidder": "0x9c8b7a6f5e4d3c2b1a0f9e8d7c6b5a4f3e2d1c0b",
    "amount_wei": "1050000000000000000"
  }),
});
const data = await res.json();
import requests
import uuid
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {AUCTRA_KEY}"}
headers["Idempotency-Key"] = str(uuid.uuid4())
res = requests.post(f"{AUCTRA_URL}/v1/auctions/{id}/bids", headers=headers, json={
    "bidder": "0x9c8b7a6f5e4d3c2b1a0f9e8d7c6b5a4f3e2d1c0b",
    "amount_wei": "1050000000000000000",
})
data = res.json()
json
{
  "error": {
    "type": "invalid_request_error",
    "code": "bid_below_minimum",
    "message": "Bid does not clear the current minimum.",
    "param": "amount_wei",
    "detail": {
      "minimum_bid_wei": "1102500000000000000"
    },
    "request_id": "req_9f2ac71b3d8e4a05",
    "docs_url": "https://docs.auctra.dev/errors#bid_below_minimum"
  }
}

#Refunds

Credited balances for outbid bidders, and how to withdraw them.

#List refund credits

GET/v1/refunds
Requires scope auctions:read

When a bidder is outbid, the contract credits them rather than sending ETH back. Pushing a refund would let a malicious contract revert on receive and freeze the auction for everyone. Refunds are pulled.

Parameters

limit integer query default 25

Page size, 1–100.

starting_after string query

An object id to page after. Cursor, not offset: auctions are inserted constantly, and ?page=2 would skip or duplicate rows whenever a new one lands between requests.

bidder string query
withdrawn boolean query

Responses

200A paginated list of refund credits.
curl -X GET "$AUCTRA_URL/v1/refunds" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUCTRA_KEY"
const res = await fetch(`${AUCTRA_URL}/v1/refunds`, {
  method: "GET",
  headers: {
    "Authorization": `Bearer ${AUCTRA_KEY}`,
  },
});
const data = await res.json();
import requests
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {AUCTRA_KEY}"}
res = requests.get(f"{AUCTRA_URL}/v1/refunds", headers=headers)
data = res.json()
json
{
  "object": "list",
  "data": [
    {
      "object": "refund",
      "id": "ref_1e5a8c3f7b2d",
      "bidder": "0x9c8b7a6f5e4d3c2b1a0f9e8d7c6b5a4f3e2d1c0b",
      "amount_wei": "1050000000000000000",
      "amount_display": "1.05",
      "withdrawn": false,
      "withdrawal_transaction": null,
      "chain_id": 11155111,
      "created_at": "2026-07-08T14:31:52.006Z"
    }
  ],
  "has_more": false,
  "next_cursor": null
}

#Read a withdrawable balance

GET/v1/refunds/balance
Requires scope auctions:read

Reads pendingReturns() straight from the chain, not the cache.

Parameters

bidder string query Required

Responses

200The live withdrawable balance.
curl -X GET "$AUCTRA_URL/v1/refunds/balance" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUCTRA_KEY"
const res = await fetch(`${AUCTRA_URL}/v1/refunds/balance`, {
  method: "GET",
  headers: {
    "Authorization": `Bearer ${AUCTRA_KEY}`,
  },
});
const data = await res.json();
import requests
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {AUCTRA_KEY}"}
res = requests.get(f"{AUCTRA_URL}/v1/refunds/balance", headers=headers)
data = res.json()
json
{
  "object": "refund_balance",
  "bidder": "0x9c8b7a6f5e4d3c2b1a0f9e8d7c6b5a4f3e2d1c0b",
  "withdrawable_wei": "1050000000000000000",
  "withdrawable_display": "1.05",
  "source": "chain"
}

#Withdraw a refund balance

POST/v1/refunds/withdraw
Requires scope auctions:write

Prepares withdraw(), which sweeps the bidder's entire credited balance across all auctions in a single transaction.

Parameters

Idempotency-Key string header

A unique string, e.g. a UUID. Replaying the same key with the same body returns the original response verbatim; with a different body it returns 409 idempotency_key_reused. Keys expire after 24 hours.

Body

bidder string Required

A 20-byte Ethereum address, lowercased in responses.

Responses

200Withdrawal transaction prepared.
curl -X POST "$AUCTRA_URL/v1/refunds/withdraw" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUCTRA_KEY"
const res = await fetch(`${AUCTRA_URL}/v1/refunds/withdraw`, {
  method: "POST",
  headers: {
    "Authorization": `Bearer ${AUCTRA_KEY}`,
    "Idempotency-Key": crypto.randomUUID(),
  },
});
const data = await res.json();
import requests
import uuid
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {AUCTRA_KEY}"}
headers["Idempotency-Key"] = str(uuid.uuid4())
res = requests.post(f"{AUCTRA_URL}/v1/refunds/withdraw", headers=headers)
data = res.json()

#Transactions

Broadcast signed transactions and poll for confirmation.

#Broadcast a signed transaction

POST/v1/transactions
Requires scope auctions:write

Optional. You can send a signed transaction to any node; this endpoint exists so an integration needs one network dependency instead of two.

Returns 202 Accepted, not 200. The chain decides whether a transaction succeeds, and it has not decided yet.

Parameters

Idempotency-Key string header

A unique string, e.g. a UUID. Replaying the same key with the same body returns the original response verbatim; with a different body it returns 409 idempotency_key_reused. Keys expire after 24 hours.

Body

signed_transaction string Required

Responses

202Accepted into the mempool.
422
curl -X POST "$AUCTRA_URL/v1/transactions" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUCTRA_KEY"
const res = await fetch(`${AUCTRA_URL}/v1/transactions`, {
  method: "POST",
  headers: {
    "Authorization": `Bearer ${AUCTRA_KEY}`,
    "Idempotency-Key": crypto.randomUUID(),
  },
});
const data = await res.json();
import requests
import uuid
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {AUCTRA_KEY}"}
headers["Idempotency-Key"] = str(uuid.uuid4())
res = requests.post(f"{AUCTRA_URL}/v1/transactions", headers=headers)
data = res.json()
json
{
  "object": "transaction",
  "hash": "0x4c1d7a90f3b2e5c8a1d4f7b0e3c6a9d2f5b8e1c4a7d0f3b6e9c2a5d8f1b4e7c0",
  "status": "pending",
  "confirmations": 0,
  "poll": "/v1/transactions/0x4c1d..."
}

#Retrieve a transaction

GET/v1/transactions/{hash}
Requires scope auctions:read

Parameters

hash string path Required

Responses

200`status` is `pending` until mined, then `confirmed` or `reverted`.
curl -X GET "$AUCTRA_URL/v1/transactions/{hash}" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUCTRA_KEY"
const res = await fetch(`${AUCTRA_URL}/v1/transactions/${hash}`, {
  method: "GET",
  headers: {
    "Authorization": `Bearer ${AUCTRA_KEY}`,
  },
});
const data = await res.json();
import requests
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {AUCTRA_KEY}"}
res = requests.get(f"{AUCTRA_URL}/v1/transactions/{hash}", headers=headers)
data = res.json()

#Webhooks

Subscribe to auction events and replay the event log.

#List webhook endpoints

GET/v1/webhook_endpoints
Requires scope webhooks:read

Responses

200Your endpoints. Secrets are never returned after creation.
curl -X GET "$AUCTRA_URL/v1/webhook_endpoints" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUCTRA_KEY"
const res = await fetch(`${AUCTRA_URL}/v1/webhook_endpoints`, {
  method: "GET",
  headers: {
    "Authorization": `Bearer ${AUCTRA_KEY}`,
  },
});
const data = await res.json();
import requests
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {AUCTRA_KEY}"}
res = requests.get(f"{AUCTRA_URL}/v1/webhook_endpoints", headers=headers)
data = res.json()
json
{
  "object": "list",
  "data": [
    {
      "object": "webhook_endpoint",
      "id": "whe_6b3d0f8a2c1e",
      "url": "https://example.com/hooks/auctra",
      "enabled_events": [
        "auction.bid_placed",
        "auction.outbid",
        "auction.settled"
      ],
      "status": "enabled",
      "created_at": "2026-07-01T08:14:22.417Z"
    }
  ],
  "has_more": false,
  "next_cursor": null
}

#Create a webhook endpoint

POST/v1/webhook_endpoints
Requires scope webhooks:write

The response contains secret exactly once. Store it; every subsequent request is signed with it, and you must verify that signature before trusting the body.

Body

url string Required
enabled_events "auction.created" | "auction.bid_placed" | "auction.outbid" | "auction.extended" | "auction.ending_soon" | "auction.ended" | "auction.settled" | "auction.cancelled" | "refund.credited" | "refund.withdrawn" | "item.claimed"[] Required

Responses

201Endpoint created. `secret` is shown once.
curl -X POST "$AUCTRA_URL/v1/webhook_endpoints" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUCTRA_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Idempotency-Key: $(uuidgen)" \
  -d '{
    "url": "https://example.com/hooks/auctra",
    "enabled_events": [
      "auction.bid_placed",
      "auction.outbid",
      "auction.settled"
    ]
  }'
const res = await fetch(`${AUCTRA_URL}/v1/webhook_endpoints`, {
  method: "POST",
  headers: {
    "Authorization": `Bearer ${AUCTRA_KEY}`,
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
    "url": "https://example.com/hooks/auctra",
    "enabled_events": [
      "auction.bid_placed",
      "auction.outbid",
      "auction.settled"
    ]
  }),
});
const data = await res.json();
import requests
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {AUCTRA_KEY}"}
res = requests.post(f"{AUCTRA_URL}/v1/webhook_endpoints", headers=headers, json={
    "url": "https://example.com/hooks/auctra",
    "enabled_events": [
        "auction.bid_placed",
        "auction.outbid",
        "auction.settled",
    ],
})
data = res.json()
json
{
  "object": "webhook_endpoint",
  "id": "whe_6b3d0f8a2c1e",
  "url": "https://example.com/hooks/auctra",
  "enabled_events": [
    "auction.bid_placed",
    "auction.outbid",
    "auction.settled"
  ],
  "secret": "whsec_9d4f2a7c1b8e0356af914d2c7b0e5836a1f4c9d2",
  "created_at": "2026-07-01T08:14:22.417Z"
}

#Delete a webhook endpoint

DELETE/v1/webhook_endpoints/{id}
Requires scope webhooks:write

Parameters

id string path Required

Responses

200Deleted.
curl -X DELETE "$AUCTRA_URL/v1/webhook_endpoints/{id}" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUCTRA_KEY"
const res = await fetch(`${AUCTRA_URL}/v1/webhook_endpoints/${id}`, {
  method: "DELETE",
  headers: {
    "Authorization": `Bearer ${AUCTRA_KEY}`,
  },
});
const data = await res.json();
import requests
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {AUCTRA_KEY}"}
res = requests.delete(f"{AUCTRA_URL}/v1/webhook_endpoints/{id}", headers=headers)
data = res.json()

#List events

GET/v1/events
Requires scope auctions:read

Every webhook we send is also a durable row here. If your listener was down, don't ask us to redeliver — read the log and reconcile.

Parameters

limit integer query default 25

Page size, 1–100.

starting_after string query

An object id to page after. Cursor, not offset: auctions are inserted constantly, and ?page=2 would skip or duplicate rows whenever a new one lands between requests.

type "auction.created" | "auction.bid_placed" | "auction.outbid" | "auction.extended" | "auction.ending_soon" | "auction.ended" | "auction.settled" | "auction.cancelled" | "refund.credited" | "refund.withdrawn" | "item.claimed" query

Responses

200A paginated list of events.
curl -X GET "$AUCTRA_URL/v1/events" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUCTRA_KEY"
const res = await fetch(`${AUCTRA_URL}/v1/events`, {
  method: "GET",
  headers: {
    "Authorization": `Bearer ${AUCTRA_KEY}`,
  },
});
const data = await res.json();
import requests
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {AUCTRA_KEY}"}
res = requests.get(f"{AUCTRA_URL}/v1/events", headers=headers)
data = res.json()
json
{
  "object": "list",
  "data": [
    {
      "object": "event",
      "id": "evt_7c2e9a1f4b6d",
      "type": "auction.outbid",
      "created_at": "2026-07-09T10:31:04.882Z",
      "data": {
        "object": {
          "auction": "auc_3f9a2c7b1d4e",
          "outbid_bidder": "0x9c8b7a6f5e4d3c2b1a0f9e8d7c6b5a4f3e2d1c0b",
          "refund_wei": "1050000000000000000"
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "has_more": true,
  "next_cursor": "evt_7c2e9a1f4b6d"
}

#Retrieve an event

GET/v1/events/{id}
Requires scope auctions:read

Parameters

id string path Required

Responses

200The event.
404
curl -X GET "$AUCTRA_URL/v1/events/{id}" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUCTRA_KEY"
const res = await fetch(`${AUCTRA_URL}/v1/events/${id}`, {
  method: "GET",
  headers: {
    "Authorization": `Bearer ${AUCTRA_KEY}`,
  },
});
const data = await res.json();
import requests
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {AUCTRA_KEY}"}
res = requests.get(f"{AUCTRA_URL}/v1/events/{id}", headers=headers)
data = res.json()

#Health

Liveness and dependency status. No authentication required.

#Check API health

GET/v1/health
No authentication required

Reports the two dependencies that can take the API down: the database and the RPC node. Use head_block to tell whether the indexer is keeping up with the chain.

Responses

200Health report.
curl -X GET "$AUCTRA_URL/v1/health" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUCTRA_KEY"
const res = await fetch(`${AUCTRA_URL}/v1/health`, {
  method: "GET",
  headers: {
    "Authorization": `Bearer ${AUCTRA_KEY}`,
  },
});
const data = await res.json();
import requests
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {AUCTRA_KEY}"}
res = requests.get(f"{AUCTRA_URL}/v1/health", headers=headers)
data = res.json()
json
{
  "object": "health",
  "status": "ok",
  "environment": "sandbox",
  "chain_id": 11155111,
  "head_block": 6142398,
  "database": "ok",
  "rpc": "ok",
  "managed_signer": "disabled"
}
On this page
AuctionsList auctionsCreate an auctionRetrieve an auctionSettle an ended auctionCancel an auctionClaim a won itemBidsList bids on an auctionPlace a bidRefundsList refund creditsRead a withdrawable balanceWithdraw a refund balanceTransactionsBroadcast a signed transactionRetrieve a transactionWebhooksList webhook endpointsCreate a webhook endpointDelete a webhook endpointList eventsRetrieve an eventHealthCheck API health
